response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable full-stack engineer with 17+ years of broad software development experience, but he falls significantly short of the Principal Engineer — AI Strategy profile. The role demands recognized, deep expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms, Director-level IC gravitas, and the ability to advise strategic enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption. His AI involvement is both recent and narrow — limited to MCP tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure in his current role — with no evidence of AI strategy, thought leadership, publications, or enterprise advisory capacity. His cloud experience is similarly absent at a strategic level.
strengths: 17+ years of diverse engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, data platforms, and developer tooling across multiple languages and environments
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform, demonstrating initiative and sustained independent product ownership
Active community contributor through conference talks, workshops, and open-source libraries, showing an ability to share knowledge and inspire others
concerns: AI expertise is nascent and infrastructure-focused — limited to MCP tooling and agentic workflow support in his current role, with no evidence of AI product leadership or strategic AI advisory experience
No demonstrated cloud strategy competency — the role requires fluency in advising strategic customers and partners on cloud and AI adoption at scale, which is absent from the resume
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no visible thought leadership artifacts (publications, patents, keynotes, recognized AI products) that would support a Director-level IC positioning
